title: lasiagrostis jacquemontii
intro: Lasiagrostis jacquemontii, also known as the Indian Beardgrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lasiagrostis jacquemontii include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating wounds. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine to treat various ailments.
